name: Classic Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 56 ounces whole tomatoes (2 -28 ounce cans), undrained
12 ounces lasagna noodles, cooked, rinsed, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, cook sausage, beef, onion, carrot, garlic and pepper flakes until meat is no longer pink and vegetables are tender; drain.
2. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, oregano, basil, 1/2 teaspoon pepper and salt. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 45 minutes or until thick, stirring occasionally.
4. Combine Ricotta cheese, 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, egg, parsley, and remaining pepper in a bowl.
5. In a greased 13-in.x 9-in.x 2-in. baking dish, layer one-fourth of the noodles, one-third of the ricotta mixture, one-fourth of the meat sauce, and 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese.
6. Repeat layers twice.
7. Top with the remaining noodles, sauce, and Parmesan cheese.
8. Cover and bake at 400 degrees for 45 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella; bake, uncovered, for 10 more minutes.
10. Let stand 15 minutes before serving. Yield: 12 servings.
